---
title: ""
toc: false
---

::: {.home-page}
::: {.hero-shell}
::: {.hero-layout}
::: {.hero-media}
<img src="images/profile.jpg" alt="Portrait of Daegeun Jo" class="profile-photo">
:::

::: {.hero-copy}
<div class="hero-name">Daegeun Jo, PhD</div>
<div class="hero-role">Theoretical condensed matter physics · Magnetism · Spintronics · Orbitronics</div>
<p class="hero-blurb hero-affiliation">Postdoctoral Researcher<br>Department of Physics and Astronomy<br>
Uppsala University<br>P.O. Box 516, SE-75120 Uppsala, Sweden</p>

::: {.button-row}
[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=lz9PnqEAAAAJ&amp;hl=en){.hero-button}
[Full CV](files/CV.pdf){.hero-button .hero-button-primary target="_blank" rel="noopener"}
:::
:::
:::
:::

## Selected Publications

{{< include _selected-publications.qmd >}}

::: {.feature-grid}
::: {.feature-card}
### Current Focus

- Spin and orbital transport
- Magneto-optic effects
- Altermagnetism
- Multipolar systems 
:::

::: {.feature-card}
### Tools

- Tight-binding model
- First-principles calculations
- Linear-response theory
:::
:::

---

Contact: [daegeun.jo@physics.uu.se](mailto:daegeun.jo@physics.uu.se)<br>
Links: [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=lz9PnqEAAAAJ&amp;hl=en), [Research Gate](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Daegeun-Jo), [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-0655-4552), [GitHub](https://github.com/jodaegeun)
:::
